seed.text: A retry test expected the second request to pass, but stale mock state from the first request caused a false 500 failure.
The fixture reused response state across requests, so the next assertion observed leftover mock state instead of a clean retry path.

holdout.text: The second API call inherited mock state from the first call because the test double was never reset between requests.
A reused stub cache polluted the next request in a retry flow, making the later assertion fail even though the handler logic was correct.
